summary: Admin Dashboard for Health Assessment Platform - Phase 1 implementation with user assessment data table, quick stats cards, and CSV export functionality
architectural_notes: Admin Dashboard Phase 1: User Assessment Data Table, Quick Stats Cards, CSV Export
Data table features: Name, Assessment Date, Total Score, Section breakdown, Contact info, Search/Filter, Sorting, Pagination (10-20 entries per page)
Future phases planned: Analytics graphs (Phase 2), User management & system config (Phase 3)

existing_features.title: Create a User Assessment Data Table component that displays all wellness reports from backend with columns: Name, Assessment Date, Total Score (0-160), Section-wise breakdown (Sleep, Gut, Movement, Mind scores), WhatsApp Number, and Email (if provided)
Add search functionality to the User Assessment Data Table that filters by user name in real-time
Implement date range and score range filters for the User Assessment Data Table
Add column sorting to the User Assessment Data Table with clickable column headers for Name, Assessment Date, Total Score, and individual section scores
Implement pagination for the User Assessment Data Table with 10-20 entries per page and page navigation controls
Create Quick Stats Cards section displaying: Total Assessments Completed, Average Score (overall), Users Needing Immediate Attention (Alert status), and Recent Submissions (last 7 days)
Add CSV export functionality that exports all filtered User Assessment Data to a downloadable CSV file with all visible columns
Update AdminDashboardPage.tsx to replace placeholder content with the new User Assessment Data Table, Quick Stats Cards, and Export functionality components
Create React Query hook useAdminAssessments in useQueries.ts for fetching all wellness reports data with automatic refetching and caching

new_feature_requests.summary: User Assessment Data Table with search, filter, sorting, and pagination
Quick Stats Cards showing total assessments, average score, alert users, and recent submissions
Basic CSV export functionality for assessment data
Add backend query function getAllWellnessReports() in main.mo that returns all stored wellness reports with user basic info, timestamps, and calculated scores
